originalAlarm.description: `curr` could be null (null value originating from line 65) and is dereferenced.

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_RECURSIVE () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Line 66: curr->val dereferenced after malloc at L65 without NULL check — null dereference in main() outside any #ifdef. Occurs in all configs. No '// ERROR' at L66 → new bug. PC (RECURSIVE=F AND SORTFILES=F) over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
